zh.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen是Erland Galen和Cecilie Herlogsdatter的兒子，出生。他和Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange至少有11個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1285年在瑞典達拉納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen是Erland Galen和Cecilie Herlogsdatter的儿子，出生。他和Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange至少有11个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1285年在瑞典達拉納。

nameMeanings.name: Erlandsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Erland (see Erlandson ).

variants.name: Ellenson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Ellensen, rare patronymic from a variant of the personal name Erland, or perhaps of the patronymic Erlandsen itself.
Alternatively, an Americanized form of Norwegian Ellingsen or of its rare Swedish cognate Ellingsson.

variants.name: Erlandson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erland, Erik, Lars, Mats, Alf, Alvar, Bjorn, Helmer, Iver, Nils, Sven.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Erlandsson: patronymic from the personal name Erland, from the Old Norse byname Erlandr, meaning ‘foreign, from a foreign country’.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Erlandsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Niels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

en.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen was born as the son of Erland Galen and Cecilie Herlogsdatter. He had at least 11 sons and 5 daughters with Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. He died in 1285, in Dalarna, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen est né, fils d’Erland Galen et Cecilie Herlogsdatter. Il a eu au moins 11 fils et 5 filles avec Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. Il est décédé en 1285, à Dalarna, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen wurde, als Sohn von Erland Galen und Cecilie Herlogsdatter geboren. Er hatte mit Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange mindestens 11 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1285 in Dalarna, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen è nato il come figlio di Erland Galen e Cecilie Herlogsdatter. Lui avuto almeno 11 figli e 5 figlie con Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. Morì nel 1285, nel Dalarna, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Niels ErlandsenはErland GalenとCecilie Herlogsdatterの息子として生まれた。彼はElisabeth Pedersdatter Strangeとの間に少なくとも11人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1285年にスウェーデンダラーナで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen(은)는 Erland Galen(와)과 Cecilie Herlogsdatter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 스웨덴 다라른아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen nasceu filho de Erland Galen e Cecilie Herlogsdatter. Ele teve pelo menos 11 filhos e 5 filhas com Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. Ele faleceu em 1285, em Dalarna, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen родился. Его родителей звали Erland Galen и Cecilie Herlogsdatter. У него было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. Он умер в 1285 г. в местности даларна, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Niels Erlandsen nació como hijo de Erland Galen y Cecilie Herlogsdatter. Tuvo por lo menos 11 hijos y 5 hijas con Elisabeth Pedersdatter Strange. Murió en 1285, en Dalarna, Suecia.
